textPlain: Crazy to me that they exempted him from the vagrancy laws. Like "Oh we can have one mysterious and entertaining vagrant".
Sometimes you find the most random things on HN, you have to wonder how that came about.Interesting character for sure, this leatherman.

A very different man, but the book 'The Autobiography of a Super Tramp' is a fascinating read from the hayday of the tramp - about one manes tramping across the UK and USAhttps://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Autobiography_of_a_Super...
There is a recent episode of The Daily about him - worth checking out!https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/23/podcasts/the-daily/old-le...
this kind of freedom, once possible, is now gone.
I thought this might be about a multi tool from the Leatherman brand
Was the tool company named after this man?
Ten separate towns did so. And people left food for him, like Santa Claus. He must have meant something to them.
Because he didn't scream at people, leave used needles in the street, or pass out in gutters.
Me too, got excited for nothing. But then I wondered - maybe that's where their name comes from?
No, named after the founder, Tim Leatherman.
